maxProcs.description: Maximum concurrent Claude CLI processes in the nest pool.

idleTimeout.description: Milliseconds an idle roost stays alive before eviction.

smallModel.description: Provider/model id used for small tasks (title generation, etc). Empty = auto-discover a free model at plugin startup.

permissionDusk.description: Milliseconds a pending permission ask waits before auto-denying.

droned.description: Opt-in drone observer. When off, the hum is a raw passthrough.

droneModel.description: Model the drone uses for its sentinel turns.

subpath.description: Linguistic sub-symbol addressing in read / do_code (foo.when.body, foo.try.otherwise, foo.loop.body, foo.return, etc). Off by default.

experimental.description: Experimental feature toggles. Off by default.

ccFlags.description: Claude CLI environment overrides. Each key/value is spread into the nest spawn env AFTER clwnd's defaults, so user entries override clwnd's. Use to re-enable CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_* flags clwnd turns off, or set arbitrary CC-facing env vars.
